title: What’s Next for Telecom and Digital Infrastructure
description: Grain Management CEO and founder David Grain discusses what's next for telecom and digital infrastructure. He sees real workloads absorbing infrastructure and says they're 'very' active in deploying capital. He speaks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GitLab Says Will Cut Jobs to Spend on Growth in ‘Agentic Era’
description: GitLab Inc., which makes software that helps developers on coding projects, said it is cutting jobs to free up money to spend on the market opportunity for artificial intelligence agents.

title: Software Firm ServiceNow Plans to Raise $4 Billion in Bond Sale
description: Software company ServiceNow Inc. is looking to raise about $4 billion from a potential US high-grade bond sale tied to the software firm’s recent acquisitions.
